title: Henny Fullbright
description: Client side mod that gives toggleable fullbright / night vision to the player
body:
Simple client-side fullbright / nightvision, toggleable with a key defined in Controls -> Keybinds (Default: B)

No other required mods.

Only required on the client.

Servers cannot detect you using this mod.

Available for Forge / NeoForge / Fabric on Minecraft 1.21.1


If you would like this mod to be ported to another version of MC just leave a comment with which version you need.
### Night With Fullbright
![Night with Fullbright](https://i.imgur.com/cmIrfyR.png)

### Night Without Fullbright
![Night without Fullbright](https://i.imgur.com/UuV7D1j.png)
